body.body: Plan approved. Implement as specified in T-self-observation-243 result: (1) SelfObservationSource in push_sources.py — runs every 30s, reads IGOR_SAID from ring, scores inward-watch habits, pushes SELF_OBS_HIT to TWM; (2) seed_self_observation_habits.py — seeds PROC_WATCH_INWARD_UNCERTAIN, PROC_WATCH_INWARD_CLAIM, PROC_WATCH_INWARD_FACTUAL. Wire into run_background_sources(). See T-self-observation-243 for full spec.
body.title: Implement self-observation: SelfObservationSource + inward watch habits (#243)
body.result: SelfObservationSource added to push_sources.py (30s interval, TWM cursor-based, dedup 5min); wire into run_background_sources(); seed_self_observation_habits.py created + run — PROC_WATCH_INWARD_UNCERTAIN/CLAIM/FACTUAL seeded to live DB as CP1 children. Syntax OK.
